title: frankenia laevis subsp. composita
intro: Frankenia laevis subsp. composita, also known as the bushy frankenia or saltbush, is a shrub-like plant that belongs to the family Frankeniaceae. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural antiseptic. Its leaves and stems have been used to treat various health issues, such as skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory problems, due to their antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and salves, to promote overall health and well-being.
